title: Radical News Networks
subtitle:
Independent media networks and radical journalism initiatives that center grassroots
                    perspectives, movement reporting, and critical analysis from the left.

initiatives.name: CrimethInc.
initiatives.description: A decentralized network coordinating radical media and mutual aid initiatives through anonymous collective action. They organize resource sharing, political education, and solidarity networks while building revolutionary perspectives through books, podcasts, news analysis, and direct action reports. Their work includes publishing extensive guides, historical analysis, and movement journalism from an anarchist perspective.

initiatives.name: It's Going Down
initiatives.description: A digital community platform coordinating radical news coverage and mutual aid initiatives across North America. They organize movement journalism, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building connections between various struggles through news reporting, analysis, and publishing first-hand accounts of resistance and direct action.

initiatives.name: Toward Freedom
initiatives.description: An independent media platform fostering mutual aid and solidarity through movement journalism and radical analysis. They coordinate grassroots reporting, investigative journalism, and solidarity networks while building power through critical perspectives on social movements, human rights, and environmental justice from around the world.

initiatives.name: International Action Center (IAC)
initiatives.description: A grassroots network fostering mutual aid and solidarity through anti-war and anti-imperialist organizing and journalism. They coordinate movement reporting, direct action support, and solidarity networks while building power through resistance to militarism, war, and corporate greed, linking with struggles against racism and oppression within the United States.
